name: skin-synthwave
title: Synthwave skin
description: Synthwave/Outrun concept skin: sunset gradient, neon glow, perspective grid horizon. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="synthwave"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/synthwave.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="synthwave" on <html>.
